title: Add Gravity Form Entry ID to Zapier Event 0001
description:
Add the Gravity Form Entry ID (GFEntryId) to the Zapier event 0001 (First Time Login) webhook payload. This ID is the final piece needed to trace a user's complete journey from initial web form signup through to their first login, closing the loop on the lead-to-activation tracking pipeline.

The entry ID (not the form ID) is the unique identifier for each form submission that ties back to the original signup record.
acceptance_criteria: Zapier event 0001 payload includes the GFEntryId field
GFEntryId contains the Gravity Form entry ID (not the form ID)
GFEntryId links back to the OTP verification record
middleware_changes: Zapier event 0001 webhook payload updated to include GFEntryId from the DTPSignup record associated with the authenticated user's OTP verification.
implementation_notes: Implementation was combined with MBT-469, which also added the TeamAdminUserId to the webhook. The GFEntryId is retrieved from the DTPSignup table using the OTP verification record linked to the user's signup.
comment_summary: Developer clarified the distinction between form ID (static, always 9) vs entry ID (unique per submission). Implementation completed in MBT-469.
